items.title: Record verpulverd: wereldwijde transferuitgaven met ruim 50 procent gestegen
items.summary: De FIFA heeft een rapport over internationale transfers gepubliceerd. Daaruit blijkt dat clubs in 2025 een recordbedrag uitgaven aan spelers. Sterker nog, er was een stijging van meer dan de helft van het bedrag in 2024.

items.title: VI Live: 'expert' Pantelic beschrijft verschil tussen Ajax en Olympiakos
items.summary: Ajax neemt het woensdagavond om 21.00 uur op tegen Olympiakos Piraeus in de Champions League. De Amsterdammers moeten zelf winnen om nog kans te maken op een plek in de tussenronde. Daarnaast zijn zij afhankelijk van de concurrentie . Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in deze VI Live.

items.title: Arbeloa: Bellingham 'cornerstone' of Madrid future
items.summary: Real Madrid coach Alvaro Arbeloa praised Jude Bellingham on Tuesday, calling the midfielder "a leader" who will be a "cornerstone of this team for many years."

items.title: Braziliaans transferrecord eraan: West Ham willigt wens Paquetá in
items.summary: Lucas Paquetá staat volgens verschillende Engelse media op het punt West Ham United te verruilen voor Flamengo, dat een Braziliaans transferrecord gaat verbeteren.

items.title: Will Bowie be next Scot to light up Serie A?
items.summary: Hellas Verona are keen on Kieron Bowie - so will the Hibernian striker be the next Scot to shine in Serie A?

items.title: West Ham agree £35.5m sale of Paqueta to Flamengo
items.summary: West Ham agree a deal to sell Brazil forward Lucas Paqueta to Flamengo for more than 41m euros (£35.5m).

items.title: West Ham seal £36.7m deal for Paquetá to join Flamengo and sign Traoré
items.summary: Winger joins from Fulham until June Ward-Prowse poised for Burnley loan Flamengo have concluded their pursuit of Lucas Paquetá by agreeing to sign the West Ham midfielder for €42m (£36.7m). Paquetá has been pushing for a return to Brazil and negotiations came to a successful end on Wednesday after Flamengo had three offers rejected. West Ham are in a relegation battle and at first tried to convince Paquetá to stay. They initially indicated they would sell the Brazil international only if Flamengo loaned him back for the rest of the season. However Paquetá has grown disillusioned with life in England and was desperate to secure an immediate move to his former club. Continue reading...

items.title: Dit kan PSV verwachten van Bayern München
items.summary: Wil PSV zich verzekeren van de tussenronde in de Champions League, dan dient het af te rekenen met de best aanvallende ploeg ter wereld. Want momenteel is er geen club zo explosief als Bayern München. Analyse van de angstloze speelwijze van Vincent Kompany.

items.title: Voormalig Feyenoorder Guidetti (33) aan de slag als analyticus
items.summary: Voormalig Feyenoorder John Guidetti heeft zich als analyticus verbonden aan het Zweedse TV4 en Sportbladet. De Zweed zit sinds zijn vertrek bij AIK zonder club, maar houdt volgens zijn entourage de deur open voor een nieuwe sportieve uitdaging.

items.title: 'HE IS BACK!' | Fury announces return to the ring on Instagram!
items.summary: Tyson Fury took to Instagram to announce he is returning to the ring, with a fight against Arslanbek Makhmudov in April now confirmed.

items.title: Tielemans out until April as Villa injury woes mount
items.summary: Aston Villa midfielder Youri Tielemans is been ruled out for up to 10 weeks, Unai Emery has confirmed.

items.title: How to reach the Champions League knockouts: Can Man City, Chelsea avoid the playoff round?
items.summary: We're less than a week away from knowing which 24 teams advance from the league phase. Here's what's at stake with only one matchweek to go.

items.title: Galatasaray are leading Türkiye's renaissance
items.summary: Galatasaray head to Manchester City on Wednesday as one of Europe's in-form teams.

items.title: Fury's comeback fight confirmed
items.summary: Tyson Fury has confirmed his comeback fight against Aslanbek Makhmudov as the former heavyweight champion returns to boxing.

items.title: Abraham joins Villa 1 day after Besiktas transfer
items.summary: Tammy Abraham has signed for Aston Villa from Besiktas just one day after he joined the Turkish club a permanent transfer from Roma.

items.title: Rodman, Hayes viral celebration caps off U.S. rout
items.summary: Trinity Rodman capped off the USWNT's 5-0 rout of Chile by coaxing coach Emma Hayes into a sideline dance, as a young American squad secured its fifth consecutive shutout Tuesday night.

items.title: Match of the Day scores viewing figures success with BBC’s new digital strategy
items.summary: Highlight clips available at 8pm on Saturday for first time Traditional viewing of weekend shows has declined Match of the Day’s viewing figures have increased considerably this season in a vindication of the BBC’s new digital strategy. Traditional linear viewing of the Saturday and Sunday evening highlights programmes had declined by 770,000 to 6.88 million average weekly views last month compared with December 2024, but MOTD has gained 1.52 million viewers by making highlight clips available on its website and app at 8pm on Saturdays for the first time. The combined viewing figures for MOTD on iPlayer covering the evening programmes and highlights clips had risen to 61.9 million by the end of December, a big increase on the 45.4 million views by the same period last season. The digital consumption of MOTD has almost doubled since the 2022-23 season, when the total figure by December was 33.1 million. Continue reading...

items.title: West Ham sign winger Traore from Fulham
items.summary: West Ham sign winger Adama Traore from Fulham on a permanent basis for an undisclosed fee.

items.title: Aki facing disciplinary committee and omitted from Ireland squad
items.summary: Bundee Aki looks set to miss Ireland's opening Six Nations match against France as he was replaced in the squad due to a disciplinary issue.

items.title: Henderson hopeful of Sir Gino returning home next week
items.summary: Sir Gino could return home to Seven Barrows next week following his injury at Cheltenham Trials Day, Nicky Henderson has told Sky Sports Racing.
